response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced Staff/Senior engineer with a strong background in distributed systems, low-latency applications, and geospatial data (GIS). While his recent roles lack the primary required languages (C++ or Rust), his expertise in DLang, high-throughput microservices, and rigorous quality assurance aligns well with the core engineering challenges of building high-performance routing pipelines. Given the job's emphasis on adaptability and willingness to learn, he is a strong candidate worth interviewing.
strengths: Extensive domain experience with geospatial data platforms and GIS applications (GISCollective, Open Green Map).
Proven track record of building low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems handling millions of requests per second.
Exceptional focus on rigorous quality assurance, test-driven development (TDD), and building automated testing tools.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with modern C++ (last used in 2015) and has no documented Rust experience.
Recent professional focus has been heavily skewed towards full-stack web technologies (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than systems-level programming.
Does not explicitly mention experience with routing algorithms or navigation guidance systems.
